name: voicetype
title: VoiceType
description: Free local dictation — record, transcribe with whisper.cpp, paste at cursor. Offline alternative to SuperWhisper.
author: jurczykpawel

commands.name: toggle
commands.title: Toggle Dictation
commands.subtitle: VoiceType
commands.description: Start recording, or stop + transcribe + paste at cursor.

commands.name: toggle-email
commands.title: Toggle Dictation — Email
commands.subtitle: VoiceType
commands.description: Start/stop dictation, auto-formatted into a ready-to-paste email.

commands.name: history
commands.title: Dictation History
commands.subtitle: VoiceType
commands.description: Search past transcripts and re-paste or copy them.

preferences.name: prompt
preferences.title: Custom vocabulary
preferences.description: Optional prompt to bias spelling of names/terms, e.g. 'Raycast, whisper.cpp, Jurczyk'.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model path (local)
preferences.description: Path to ggml whisper model. Used by the Local backend.

preferences.name: cloudKey
preferences.title: Cloud API key
preferences.description: API key for the Cloud backend. Get a free one at console.groq.com.

preferences.name: cloudModel
preferences.title: Cloud model
preferences.description: Transcription model for the Cloud backend.

preferences.name: deepgramKey
preferences.title: Deepgram API key
preferences.description: API key for the Deepgram backend (console.deepgram.com).

preferences.name: elevenlabsKey
preferences.title: ElevenLabs API key
preferences.description: API key for the ElevenLabs Scribe backend.

preferences.name: paste
preferences.title: Auto-paste
preferences.label: Paste transcript at cursor (Cmd+V)
preferences.description: When on, the transcript is pasted into the focused app. When off, it only lands on the clipboard.
